blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 157 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
